benefits.description: Significant appetite suppression at 2mg per week, with food cravings returning by end of month prompting dose increase

side_effects.description: No appetite at all for the first couple of days after increasing from 1mg to 2mg per week

protocol_notes: Started at 1mg/week, titrated up to 2mg/week, then to 4mg/week (2mg twice a week) after 4 months. Now dosing 2mg whenever food cravings return, approximately every 3-4 days. Notes some people need up to 12mg/week. Advises counting macros upward as appetite suppression can make eating enough difficult.
